pairs.key: for EMF
pairs.value: 適用於 EMF

pairs.key: special thanks to Cody, top donator!
pairs.value: 特別感謝 Cody，最高捐贈者！

pairs.key: your third cousin's, dog's, previous owner's, uncle's, old boss's, fifth favourite mod!
pairs.value: 你三表親家的狗的前主人的叔叔的前老闆最喜歡的第五個模組！

pairs.key: breaking your resource packs since April 1st 2023.
pairs.value: 自 2023 年 4 月 1 日起持續破壞你的資源包。

pairs.key: not fit for consumption in Portugal.
pairs.value: 不適合在葡萄牙食用。

pairs.key: one of the mods ever made!
pairs.value: 史上其中一個模組！

pairs.key: ,serutaeF ledoM ytitnE gnidoaL
pairs.value: ,正在載入實體模型特性

pairs.key: did you know if you turn off the lights and whisper 'OptiFine' 3 times you will lose 20fps.
pairs.value: 你知道嗎，如果你關掉燈並低聲念 3 次“OptiFine”，你就會損失 20fps。

pairs.key: now compatible with Minecraft Legends!
pairs.value: 現在相容 Minecraft Legends！

pairs.key: now available for Terraria!
pairs.value: 現已登陸 Terraria！

pairs.key: OptiFine's weirder younger half-brother that runs around making train models.
pairs.value: OptiFine 那個更古怪的弟弟，四處跑來跑去做火車模型。

pairs.key: 0% Opti, 70% Fine.
pairs.value: 0% Opti，70% 正常。

pairs.key: we get there when we get there.
pairs.value: 到了自然就到了。

pairs.key: the ETA is a lie.
pairs.value: 預計時間是騙人的。

pairs.key: allegedly compatible with the OptiFine format.
pairs.value: 據稱相容 OptiFine 格式。

pairs.key: now compatible with every mod, except all the ones that aren't...
pairs.value: 現在相容所有模組，除了那些不相容的……

pairs.key: 100% of the time it works 90% of the time!
pairs.value: 有 100% 的時候，它在 90% 的情況下都能奏效！

pairs.key: now moving all models 0.00001 blocks to the left every 4 seconds.
pairs.value: 現在每 4 秒將所有模型向左移動 0.00001 格。

pairs.key: PI = 3.1415927 and you can't convince me otherwise.
pairs.value: PI = 3.1415927，誰也別想說服我不是這樣。

pairs.key: making those animations fresh since 1862!
pairs.value: 讓這些動畫自 1862 年起就保持鮮活！

pairs.key: Trabee got the flu!
pairs.value: 蜂塔比得流感了！

pairs.key: is this 'EPF' in the room with us now?
pairs.value: 這個“EPF”現在和我們在一個房間裡嗎？

pairs.key: Loading Entity Model Features,
pairs.value: 正在載入實體模型特性，

pairs.key:
EMF has crashed due to a (probably) unrelated forge dependency error,
 EMF has been disabled so the true culprit will be sent to users after game load:
pairs.value:
EMF 因（可能）無關的 forge 依賴錯誤而崩潰，
 EMF 已被停用，以便在遊戲載入後將真正的罪魁禍首發送給使用者：

pairs.key: EBE Enhanced Chests are disabled by a loaded EMF model!
pairs.value: 由於已載入的 EMF 模型，EBE 增強箱子已被停用！

pairs.key: EBE Enhanced Shulker Boxes are disabled by a loaded EMF model!
pairs.value: 由於已載入的 EMF 模型，EBE 增強潛影盒已被停用！

pairs.key: EBE Enhanced Bells are disabled by a loaded EMF model!
pairs.value: 由於已載入的 EMF 模型，EBE 增強鍾已被停用！

pairs.key: EBE Enhanced Beds are disabled by a loaded EMF model!
pairs.value: 由於已載入的 EMF 模型，EBE 增強床已被停用！

pairs.key: EBE Enhanced Signs are disabled by a loaded EMF model!
pairs.value: 由於已載入的 EMF 模型，EBE 增強告示牌已被停用！

pairs.key: EBE Enhanced Decorated Pots are disabled by a loaded EMF model!
pairs.value: 由於已載入的 EMF 模型，EBE 增強紋飾陶罐已被停用！

pairs.key: EBE config modified by EMF, the following blocks have been disabled in EBE because they have custom entity models (this can be disabled in EMF's settings):
pairs.value: EBE 配置已被 EMF 修改，以下方塊因具有自定義實體模型而在 EBE 中被停用（可在 EMF 設定中關閉）：
